subject: Esportmaniacos: "{team} is a serious contender"
body:
The Esportmaniacos program has named {team} as one of the most improved teams in the league.

"They've found an identity and they're sticking to it," the analyst commented during the show.

Your work is being noticed at the national level.

es.subject: Esportmaniacos: "{team} es un serio candidato"
es.body:
El programa Esportmaniacos ha señalado a {team} como uno de los equipos más mejorados de la liga.

"Han encontrado una identidad y se están aferrando a ella," comentó el analista durante el programa.

Su trabajo está siendo notado a nivel nacional.
